description_for_human: Book hotels through IMPT — €5 free for guests, 5% Goodness back, 1 tonne CO₂ offset per booking.
description_for_model: Use IMPT Swarm to search hotels, request quotes, and produce canonical booking deeplinks. Every deeplink lands on app.impt.io/find-hotel-input with full UTM attribution. Pass a destination CITY (never country). Final currency is destination-driven, not user-locale. Partner key is required for revshare attribution; default to 'swarm-public' if none.
